title: Shorter Elytra
description: Shortens the Elytra wings while keeping the vanilla Minecraft texture style. Perfect for YouTube creators, PvP, building, and clean visuals.
body:
![a side-by-side comparison of a player wearing the default elytra next to another player wearing the Shorter Elytra resource pack to showcase the difference in length.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e86fbbe00d24ef724d4b0ed152f4ae6675ef57ca.png)

Shorter Elytra is a lightweight Minecraft resource pack that reduces the length of Elytra wings while keeping the original vanilla design intact. It’s perfect for players who want a more compact, less obtrusive look while flying, building, or playing PvP.


1. Shortened Elytra wings
2. Same vanilla texture and colors
3. Better visibility in first and third-person

Whether you're trying to see your armor better or just want a less bulky appearance, this pack gives you a subtle, polished alternative without breaking immersion.

👤 Created by Avrok
